# 特殊关键要求

适用场景最主要是教室悬挂装饰，其次是泳池派对装饰，婴儿派对装饰，新娘派对装饰，婚礼装饰，海滩派对装饰
五点中中间有一点是质量好，可以重复使用

竞品的五点：

1.PERFECT FOR VARIOUS SCENARIOS: Colorful paper lanterns is a perfect decorations for events such as Weddings, Baby shower, Birthday, BBQ, Celebrations, Room decor, Bridal shower, Easter, Halloween,Christmas, Valentine's, Mardi Gras, Chinese new years, and General ambiance and other theme parties

SETS CONTENT: The sets contains 20 Pcs Multicolor paper lanterns(6 inch in diameter), you can also insert a mini led light inside the lanterns and it will work perfect (mini led light not included)

EASY TO ASSEMBLE: Made of sturdy quality paper and metal supports, paper lanterns could easily be stored and used multiple times. Easy assembly required with instruction paper

RECYCLABLE PREMIUM QUALITY：Our bright and cheery party decorations set made of high quality paper. Lightweight and reusable

2.Transform Any Space with Pastel Perfection; Our set of 12 macaron-colored lanterns brings a touch of elegance and charm to any occasion; Each lantern measures 10 inches, making them the ideal size for eye-catching decorations

Six Delightful Colors, Double the Fun; Enjoy a variety of pastel shades with two lanterns in each color; These soft hues create a harmonious and inviting atmosphere, perfect for any event

Easy Setup, Maximum Impact; With included stands and easy-to-follow instructions, setting up these lanterns is a breeze; Whether you're decorating for a wedding, a child's birthday party, a holiday celebration, or sprucing up a classroom, these lanterns add a stylish flair

Perfect for Any Celebration; From weddings to birthday parties, holiday festivities to classroom decorations, our versatile lanterns are perfect for any occasion; Create a magical and festive ambiance effortlessly

Durable and Reusable; Made from high-quality materials, these lanterns are built to last; Use them again and again to brighten up your favorite spaces and make every event special

3.【PACKAGE CONTAINS】Macaron rainbow paper lantern set contains 15 pieces of lanterns to hang at the party, sizes include 6 pieces of 10 inches, 2 pieces of 8 inches and 7 pieces of 6 inches. These colorful paper lanterns can be used as a variety of indoor and outdoor parties to create a perfect atmosphere

【PASTEL MACARON PAPER LANTWENS DECORATIONS】The macaron rainbow paper lantern set comes in 6 bright colors, including light pink, blue, purple, mint green, yellow and orange. These colorful paper lanterns will create a retro and romantic atmosphere. The pastel hanging paper lanterns will add vitality to your room and redecorate your space with a rainbow of soft colors

【VERSATILE DECORATION】These softly decorated paper lanterns have endless possibilities and are perfect for a variety of events, from birthdays, Easter party decorations, Valentines, Mother's Day, bridal showers, and weddings to graduation, baby shower, and engagement parties. They are also charming additions to classrooms and homes, instantly brightening up any space with their simple yet elegant design

【DURABLE AND REUSABLE】These colorful Chinese paper lanterns are easy to use and store, and they are reusable. Gently unfold the paper lantern, put the metal frame in it, adjust it a little, and it's done. After the event, you can clean the metal frame and store it for next use. You can decorate it on the balcony, window, ceiling, above the table, on the wall, on the branches according to the actual situation, and it can also be used as a photo background and desktop decoration
